Submit Update
Home/Submit

Submit a Listing

Send enough information for a useful review.

Use this page to suggest a new listing, correct an existing entry, submit an event path, or recommend a directory, calendar, newsletter, visitor guide, or media channel. A submission is a review request, not automatic publication.

Before you submit

Include the source, the place, and the reader action.

1

Name the listing

Use the public name of the business, organization, program, service, gallery, event, venue, or resource.

2

Pick the section

Choose the county page, network directory, appendix, amplifier channel list, posting map, or templates/resources area.

3

Add proof

Include a website, form, social page, public directory link, flyer, official page, or contact route that can be checked.

4

State the use

Say whether readers should list, post, contact, visit, register, ask about advertising, verify public information, or request a correction.

Submission form

Listing, correction, channel, or event update.

Use this form to send details for review. Replace the placeholder contact details before publishing if a real intake inbox is available.

Placeholder contact

Manual intake path until final contacts are confirmed.

Email

updates@statelineguide.example

Phone

(575) 000-0000

Mail

000 Main Street
Raton, NM 87740

Replace these placeholders before public launch if submissions should go to a real inbox, department, partner, or shared review queue.

{next_action_block(1, [ ("Search the current directory before submitting", "network/"), ("Open the public contact appendix", "appendix/"), ("Find amplifier channels to verify", "amplifiers/"), ("Read the creation process and source method", "about/"), ])}

Submission examples

Send enough context for review without making the reviewer guess.

A useful submission includes the public source, county, town, contact route, audience served, and the action a reader should take.

Add a venue

Include venue name, town, county, website, booking/contact path, event types, public calendar status, accessibility notes, and whether outside listings are accepted.

Correct a business listing

Include old information, corrected information, source link, contact route, and the specific page or listing that should change.

Add an artist or gallery route

Include portfolio or public source, town/county, contact path, whether they accept commissions, exhibitions, classes, markets, or public-art inquiries.

Add a nonprofit program

Include organization name, program purpose, public benefit, referral/contact path, service area, and source link.

Add a music route

Include performer, venue, open mic, festival, promoter, or sound-support details; source link; booking path; location; and whether the route is public-facing.

Back to top

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders so users can act without treating old details as final.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Open resource directory Submit a correction

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
